name: github-maintenance
description: Maintenance skills for keeping repositories healthy over time. Currently ships agent-context-sync — a periodic, repo-agnostic doctor for AI-context files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, .github/copilot-instructions.md) that verifies concrete claims against the repo, flags bloat against an opinionated quality spec, and proposes minimal edits via report-only or pull-request mode.
